title: mentha lactantii
intro: Mentha lactantii, also known as White Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with White Mint include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve mental focus. White Mint can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or added to herbal infusions, such as peppermint or chamomile, to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
